keyFactors: Turkey has a higher Elo rating of 1731 compared to Australia's 1666.
Turkey's weighted form of 2.27 and recent form of 2.2 indicates stronger current performance compared to Australia's 1.464 and 1.7.
Turkey has a higher goals for average of 1.937 in comparison to Australia’s 1.257.
Australia has had a longer break with 194 days since last match versus Turkey's 61 days, possibly affecting match fitness.
The match is at a neutral venue, mitigating Australia’s potential home advantage.
risks: Australia has a higher clean sheet rate of 0.542, which may help them defensively.
The lack of head-to-head history introduces uncertainty regarding direct competition between these teams.
Turkey's lower clean sheet rate of 0.296 could be a vulnerability if Australia applies effective attacking strategies.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Türkei mit deutlich besserer gewichteter Form (2.27 vs 1.464) und höherer recentForm (2.2 vs 1.7); Höherer Elo-Wert der Türkei (1731 vs 1666) untermauert leichten Klassenvorsprung; Türkei mit klar stärkerer Offensive (1.937 vs 1.257 Tore/Spiel).
